title: Smooth SMP pack
description: Lightweight resource pack that removes or simplifies certain particle effects for a cleaner, vanilla-friendly experience.
body:
#  Smooth SMP Pack

 Smooth SMP Pack is a lightweight Minecraft resource pack focused on removing and simplifying certain particle effects that can create visual clutter during SMP and survival gameplay.
## 
This pack does not overhaul textures or UI. Its purpose is to maintain a clean, vanilla-friendly look while reducing unnecessary visual effects related to particles.

![Ɓanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e106e6fb03869a8424c0454d1d1564bf75a863a4.webp)
### ✨ What This Pack Does

Removes or simplifies certain particle effects

Reduces excessive visual effects during gameplay

Keeps the vanilla Minecraft aesthetic intact

Focuses on visual clarity rather than feature changes

### 🚫 What This Pack Does NOT Do

Does not change block textures

Does not edit UI elements

Does not guarantee or measure performance or FPS improvements

### 🎯 Recommended For

SMP & Survival players

Players who prefer fewer particle effects

Vanilla-focused gameplay with reduced visual clutter

[![dc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98df16a53357ada12b1156235d9bd3a4cd5b4c04.png)](https://discord.gg/hJpFwaZEk2)

### 🧩 Resolution

Default Minecraft resolution (16x)

🛠 Compatibility

Minecraft 1.19+ / 1.20+ / 1.21+

📜 Asset Ownership
All changes in Smooth SMP Pack were created by me.
No textures or assets were copied or extracted from other resource packs.
